title: Chapter 20
content:
Chapter 20: I Visually Violate the Huge Ass of the Busty Priestess Who was About to Get Attacked by Tentacles (1)

In the end, we didn’t reach any human settlement on the day we got stranded.

However, Iferasky redeemed her reputation—or rather, showed the true worth of a beastkin—by finding us a pretty nice sleeping spot. It was a sandy area with good visibility. We couldn’t block the night wind, but we’d notice any approaching enemies right away.

Gundam characters often camp in deserts, so it’s probably fine to sleep in one (this is the limit of my knowledge when I’m not in Sage Mode).

That said, since Iferasky is a bit of an airhead, I can’t completely rule out the possibility that she just picked a random spot.

I didn’t know if the Dragon God Lucia would summon me again that night, so I tied my leg to hers using her waistcloth. Maybe she was satisfied from last night’s handjob session, because there was no summons tonight.

The next morning, I stepped away from our sleeping spot to take a leak and spotted a fortified city beyond the gentle hills. Probably about a ten-minute walk.

Apparently, we had been camping right next to a human town.

"Iferasky, if you could smell civilization this close, you should’ve noticed with that wild animal nose of yours..."

"...?"

"I’m heading over there..."

"...!"

When I started walking toward the city, Iferasky naturally followed. She seemed to have completely taken a liking to me. I have no idea how to handle a wild horse pussy. Are we just going to form a party like this? Will she wander off eventually?

Being alone is lonely, so I’m happy she’s staying with me... but still.

The fortified city was surrounded by thick stone walls, just like the castle towns you see in Europe. Yeah, it really felt like a proper fortress city.

Greeting strangers is nerve-wracking, but I still said hello to the gate guards. Since I wanted to get inside, I couldn’t afford to make them suspicious.

The guard had a classic medieval knight vibe—chainmail with a red surcoat over it, equipped with a sword and shield.

"G-good m-mor—uhh... guh..."

"Suspicious bastard! What are you doing walking around naked with a beastkin?!"

He suddenly pointed his sword at me.

Suspicious person right off the bat. I’d spent more time completely naked since coming to this other world, so I’d honestly forgotten I was fully nude.

Shit...

I couldn’t come up with a legitimate reason for traveling naked. If I’d known this would happen, I should’ve had Iferasky suck me off to enter Sage Mode. I would’ve been able to think of at least one or two excuses.

Fortunately, the situation didn’t get too serious.

The other gate guard calmed his colleague down and made him sheath his sword. This one had a feather ornament on his helmet, so I figured he was higher-ranking. Let’s call him Gatekeeper A.

"You got attacked by goblins or bandits and got stripped, right?"

"Y-yeah..."

I’ll go with that story.

"You look pretty haggard. You okay?"

"I-I’m fine."

The reason I looked so worn out was because Iferasky had been sucking and milking me dry nonstop.

"The horse girl you’ve got with you has chestnut hair and long legs—she must be a large breed of forest horse. Probably from the western forest region?"

Western?

So Iferasky is a western breed?

I decided to probe a bit.

"Ah, um... Yeah, around Margland..."

"I see. So definitely the west. Those western horse pussies are famous for being fast."

Great. Confirmed that the female knight Iria’s castle in Margland is to the west.

Is Iferasky a large breed? Are there smaller horse girls, or will she grow even bigger...?

"I’ll leave the gate to you for a bit. I’ll take care of this traveler."

"Understood."

Looks like following Gatekeeper A was the right move.

Since even a shut-in like me thought he seemed like a good person, he must be genuinely kind. His chainmail coif and helmet covered most of his face, but his eyes looked gentle.

"Come with me."

"Y-yes. Um... the horse girl too?"

"Yeah. The horse girl comes along."

Led by Gatekeeper A, I passed through the city gate.

At first glance, the inside of the fortified city was full of brick buildings and looked prosperous.

"This way."

"Yes."

I followed behind Gatekeeper A, walking along the city wall to the right.

Iferasky followed me without being told. I wonder if she’ll suddenly disappear on a whim one day... That would be lonely.

The city wasn’t neatly laid out in a grid. The path gradually narrowed until we reached what looked like a dead-end triangle from above.

Huh?

There was no building entrance. It was a complete dead end.

"This should be fine."

Gatekeeper A leaned his sword and shield against the wall and suddenly started taking off his clothes.

"Eh?"

D-don’t tell me he’s after Iferasky in a sexual way?!

Under his outer clothes appeared chainmail with a dull, sinister glint.

While he was struggling to undress, I had to get Iferasky out of here! I waved my hand behind my back, signaling her to run.

But I didn’t hear any footsteps leaving.

Damn it. She’s too much of an airhead to understand the situation.

I might get beaten to a pulp, but I’ll buy time for Iferasky to escape!

...Hm?

Gatekeeper A smiled gently at me.
